allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add init script for AI-assisted ralph setup

Adds ralph/init script that runs Claude or Codex to automate ralph setup:
- Adds ralph/ to .git/info/exclude
- Creates prompt files from example templates
- Supports --beads flag to initialize beads and use .example.beads.md templates
- Supports --claude flag to set up .claude/commands/ symlinks
- Supports --yolo for full permissions mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
